name: Spaghetti with Orange-Scented Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pan. Add the garlic and half the basil leaves, cooking until the garlic turns golden.
2. Add the diced tomatoes and salt. Cook over high heat until the sauce thickens, about 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Stir in the orange juice and Tabasco sauce. Continue cooking over high heat for another 5 minutes.
4. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed. Toss with cooked spaghetti.
